rewritten_requirements: The system shall require a person to either create an account or log in.
The system shall allow admins to add, edit, or remove user profiles.
The system shall enable admins to review articles and decide on their publication or rejection.
The system shall permit content creators to write articles and send them for editing.
The system shall have editors review articles from content creators and pass them for approval.
The system shall restrict access if a login attempt is invalid.
The system shall make published articles available for user reading.
The system shall allow users to search for more articles during their reading session.
The system shall enable users to provide feedback after reading articles.
The system shall end when users complete their search or provide feedback.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A person must create an account or log in to use the system.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A person starts by either creating an account or logging in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Admins can manage user profiles by adding, editing, or removing them.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the person is an admin, they can manage user profiles by adding, editing, or removing them.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Admins can review articles and decide whether to publish them or reject them.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can also review articles and decide whether to publish them or reject them.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Content creators can write an article and send it for editing.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the person is working on content, they can write an article and send it for editing.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Editors review articles sent by content creators and pass them forward for approval.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The editor reviews the article and passes it forward for approval.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Invalid login attempts prevent further use of the system.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the login is not valid, the person is not allowed to continue.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Published articles are available for users to read.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once an article is published, users can read it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can search for more articles while reading.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: While reading, they can continue reading more articles.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can provide feedback after reading articles.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After reading, the user can either search for more articles or give feedback.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system ends when users finish searching or providing feedback.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If feedback is given or the user finishes searching, it ends.
